Text: Hello Wayfair Team, Thank you for reaching out regarding this PO however, in order to approve this request we require the following information: Verification that the supplier has confirmed the items can be partially shipped, as well as who you spoke with to confirm. Provide the Item Number(s) and QTY(s) of the item(s) to be shipped Provide the Item Number(s) and the QTY(s) of the item(s) that will be shipping later. Provide the warehouse location (if the stock needs to be split between warehouse location or if the request is warehouse specific) Thank you,

Hello Wayfair Team, Thank you for confirming this information with our supplier. I have split this PO as requested below and sent the supplier an email notification of the adjustments made to this order. Please note, splitting the order will restart the lead time for these PO’s. The new ship date for these two POs are {provide ship date}. We should see tracking uploaded to the order within 48 hours of this new ship date. Thanks again for reaching out. I am marking this ticket as complete. If you need further support with this issue, please comment to re-open. Thank you,

Hello Wayfair Team, Thank you for reaching out on this. Please note that this request type is limited to providing support on if a PO needs to be split between warehouses for fulfillment. This ticket will be closed as the request is out of scope. This request type is not supplier facing, so please note supplier partners are unable to view or respond to this request. If supplier visibility is required on this request, please submit a new request on the suppliers behalf in Partner Home utilizing the following request path: Help & Support > Submit a Ticket > Dropship Order Fulfillment > Problem Fulfilling an Order > General Fulfillment Help Thank you,

Hello Wayfair Team, Thank you for reaching out. We were unable to action this request as there is no inventory available in the requested warehouse. Thanks again for reaching out. I am marking this ticket as complete. If you need further support with this issue, please comment to re-open. Thank you,

Template Use Case/Title: Help Needed Request (Split PO) Split PO/Help Needed is the correct process for customer facing teams with supplier issues they cannot resolve
Text: Hello Wayfair Team, Thank you for confirming this information with our supplier. I have completed the request. Please direct the supplier to enter a ticket directly if they have further requests. Thank you,
